verses.text: Sal ka suah uh a kum sagih kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Topa' kiang panin thu a dong dingin Israel makai pawlkhat ka kiangah hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen, ‘Kei tungah thu a dong dingin hong pai na hi uh hiam? Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin note' thudotin ka om het kei ding hi, ci-in gen in,’ hong ci hi
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute tungah thu a khen dingin na kiging nai hiam? Na kigin' khit leh amaute tungah thu khen in. A pu a pate uh' gamtat hoihlohna teng amaute phawksak in

Amaute tungah keima thugente gen in. Israel mite ka teel laitakin amaute tungah thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Egypt gamsungah amaute tungah ka kilang a, kei pen Topa note' Pasian ka hi hi, ci-in ka kigen hi

Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiatpihin, amaute-a' dingin ka zon'khiatsak, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gam ahi, gamsung khempeuh panin a hoihpenna munah amaute ka tun'pih ding ni teek mahin ka kiciam hi
Kei pen Topa amaute' Pasian ka hih manin a muhdahhuai a milim itte uh paikhia-in, Egypt mite' pasian manlote tawh a kinitsak lohna ding uh ka gen hi

Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong demin, ka thugen hong ngailo uh hi. A muhdahhuai a milimte uh paikhia tuanlo uh a, Egypt pasian-te zong nusialo uh hi. Tua hi a, ka heh mahmahna teng Egypt gamsungah thuaksakgawp ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi

Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin no Israel mite kong paikhiatpih ding hi, ci-in amau' ompih mite' zakin gen khin ka hih manin, tua bangin gim thuaksak leng keima min a daisak suak ding, cih ngaihsutna hangin gim ka pia kei hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiatpihin gamlak ka tun'pih a
a zui peuhpeuh a nuntak theihna ding ka thukhamte leh ka thupiaknate ka hilh hi
Topa ahi keimah in amaute pen mi siangtho-in ka bawlna thu a phawkna dingun kote' kikalah thukimna limin Sabbath tan' ding thu ka pia hi

Ahi zongin Israel mite in gamlak nangawnah kei hong dem uh a, a zui peuhpeuh in nuntakna a ngahna ding uh ahi keima thukhamte leh ka thupiaknate a nial uh hi. Ka Sabbath-te zong nakpi takin siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute a maiman'na dingin ka hehnateng gamlakah a thuaksakgawp dingin ka kithawi hi
Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpihna minam dangte in hong mu khin ahih manin tua bangin gamta leng, keima mindaina ding mah hi zel ahih manin amaute bangmah ka cih kei hi
Tua ahih manin bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na, gam hoihpen ahi, amaute tungah ka piaksa gamah amaute ka paipih lohna ding thu, gamlakah ka kiciam hi

Tua bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zuilo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Amaute in kei hong biak ding uh sangin milim biak ding utzaw uh ahihna hang ahi hi
“Ahi zongin amaute ka khasiat a, gamlakah amaute ka susia kei a, ka maimangsak kei hi
A tate uh kiangah, ‘Na pu na pate un a bawl thukhamte zui kei un la, amaute' tat ngeinate zui kei un. A milim biakte uh tawh zong kininsak kei un
Kei pen Topa ahi note' Pasian ka hi hi. Ka thukhamte zui un la, ka thupiaknate bangin gamta un
Kei pen Topa ahi note' Pasian ka hihna na phawkna ding uh leh note tawh i bawlsa thukimna lim dingin Sabbath-te na siangthosak un,’ ka ci hi

“Ahi zongin a tate nangawn un kei hong dem uh hi. A zuite in nuntakna a ngahna ding ahi ka thukhamte palsatin ka thupiaknate manglo uh a, Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin, ka hehnateng gamlakah thuaksak gawpin, amaute a sumai dingin ka kithawi hi
Ahi zongin tua bangin hih leng, Egypt gam panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih hong mu mite' lakah ka min dai ding ahih manin amaute ka susia kei hi
Tua ahih manin leitung gam khempeuhah amaute ka thehthang gawpna ding thu, amaute tungah kiciamna dang khat tua gamlakah ka bawl leuleu hi
Hih bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zuilo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua banah a pu a pate un a biak milimte mah a biakna hang uh ahi hi
“Tua ahih manin kei zong amaute-a' dingin nuntakna a piangsaklo thukhamte leh thupiaknate amaute tung-ah ka pia hi

Amaute' biakpiaknate mah tawh amau mah kininsakin, a tapa upa pente uh zong biakna-in ka piasak hi. Hih bangin ka hihna pen amaute gimpiakna leh kei pen Topa ka hihna thu a hong theihna ding uh ahi hi
“Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A cihtaklohna uh tawh na pu na pate un ka min hong daisakin kei hong hehsak uh hi

Amaute tungah piak dingin ka ciamna gamah amaute ka paipih hi. Amaute in mual sang ahi a, singnim khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a muh uh ciangin tua bang mun khempeuhah biakna a pia uh hi. Meihal biakna a piakna uh leh tuiphih biakna a piaknate uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi
Amaute kiangah, ‘Na paina uh mun sangte bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in ka dong hi. Tua ahih manin tua huna kipanin tua munte pen ‘Mun Sangte,’ kici hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin gen in: Na pu na pate un a bawl mawhnate mah note in zong bawlin a milimte mah uh sulzuih ding na hi uh hiam

Tuni ciangdongin note in a kipia ngei letsongte mah puakin, tua milimte mah biakna-in na tate uh na hal uh ciangin no leh no a kininsaktawm na hi uh hi. Tua bangin na gamtat khit uh ciangin no Israel mite, kei kiangah thu a dong dingin nong pai lai uh hi. Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, note' thudotin ka om het kei taktak ding hi
Note in na lungsim ngaihsutna uh khentat khinin, gamdangah a teng minam dangte mah bangin sing leh suang na bia nuam uh hi. Ahi zongin note' utbang hithei ngeilo ding hi
“Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khut khauh tak leh ka vangliatna leh ka hehna tawh note kong ukgawp taktak ding hi
Gam khempeuhah note kong thehthangna panin kong kaihkhopkik ciangin note tungah ka vangliatna leh ka hehna kong lak ding hi
Note pen minam tuamtuamte' gamah kong paipih ding a, tua munah maitang kituahin note tungah thu kong khen ding hi
Egypt gamsung Sinai gamlakah na pu na pate uh tungah thu ka khen mah bangin tu-in note' tungah kong khen ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi
“Note khauhtakin kong uk ding a, thuciamna kong zuisak ding hi

Note lak panin a lehdo thei mite leh kei tungah hong mawh mite ka lakhia ding hi. Tu laitakin a ompakna uh gam panin ka lakhia ding a, ahi zongin Israel gamah ka ciahsak kik kei ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi

Topa Pasian in, “Israel mite khempeuh aw, na milimte uh biabia un! Ahih hangin tu-a kipanin keima thu nong man' uh kul ding a, na milimte uh letsong piakna tawh ka min siangtho na daisak nawn kei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi

Topa Pasian in, “Ka mual siangtho, Israel mual sang tungah Israel mite khempeuh in kei nong bia ding uh hi. Note tungah kong lungdam ta ding a, biakpiaknate, a limcipen piaknate, leh na letsong siangthote uh kong lamen ta ding hi

Na kithehthangna uh gam tuamtuam panin note hong paikhiatpihin mun khatah note kong kaihkhop khit ciangin a namtui na biakpiaknate uh kong sang ding hi. Note in kei nong biak manun minam dangte in a siangtho ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi
Na pu na pate uh tungah piak dingin ka ciam Israel gamsungah note kong tun'pih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi
Tua hun ciangin, a kilawmloin na gamtatnate khempeuh uh leh nomau mah na kinitsak tawmna thute uh na phawk ding uh a, na gamtat siatnasate uh hangin nomau mah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi

Na gitlohna, na gamtatsiatna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong bawlloin, ka min a daikhak ding khualna tawh note tungah hong gamta ka hih manin kei pen Topa ka hihna thu no Israel mite in na hong thei ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leitaw Lam Gam Siat Ding Genkholhna

verses.text: Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leitaw lam gam en in la, leitaw lam gam siatna ding thu genin, leitaw lam gam tulakte a siatna ding thu genkhol in

Leitaw lam tulakte kiangah thu gen in la, Topa' thugen ngai un. Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En un, tu-in gamhal a kipan ding ka hi a, na sunga om singkung a hing, a keu-in kangtummang ding hi. Kuamah in tua meikuang phelh zolo ding hi. A taw panin a khung dongin kangtummang ding hi
Hih gamsung a halpa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu leh kuamah in a phelh zawhlohna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, kei hong sawl kei in. Mi khempeuh in kei pen khiatna nei-a thugen theipa hi, ci-in a hong ngaihsut uh ka hi hi,” ci-in ka nial hi.
